g.text: NOT installed by the chart: three hard prerequisites
This is an inventory: what the chart installs and where it lands.
For how the CA, the issuers, the Bundle and
the leaf certs actually chain together, see the trust chain figure; that page owns it. The per-Agent and
per-AgentTask Certificates are absent here on purpose: reconcilers create them at provisioning time, not the chart.
The chart never installs the three prerequisites above,
so teams with an existing cert-manager reuse it. It ships
only the ClusterIssuer, Certificate and Bundle resources Kaalm needs. Admission webhooks are not used: the
cert-manager dependency is solely for TLS lifecycle management.
Both Deployments have a hard floor of 2 replicas,
enforced by a Helm fail template guard that aborts rendering
below it. The floor is operational, not correctness-driven: the control plane's second replica keeps the activator
reachable across drains (the activator handler runs on every replica), and the gateway's gives rolling updates
headroom. Anti-affinity is specified for the controller only.
